description.notes: Immediate transfer test: User reports credit score dropped due to erroneous delinquency report from Rho-Bank. This matches the Backend Incident 11/14 which requires IMMEDIATE transfer without identity verification or troubleshooting. Agent must use emergency_credit_bureau_incident_transfer_1114() then transfer_to_human_agents.

user_scenario.instructions:
**Your character:** You are Priya Sharma, a 34-year-old software engineer from Chicago, IL. You have a Gold Rewards Card and an EcoCard with Rho-Bank. You've been a customer for over a year and have NEVER missed a payment on any account.

**Your situation:** You just received an urgent alert from your credit monitoring service (Credit Karma) saying your credit score dropped 127 points overnight. When you looked at the details, it says Rho-Bank reported a 60-day delinquency on your credit card account. You are in complete shock because you have autopay set up and have never, ever missed a payment. You checked your Rho-Bank account and your payments are all on time. You're panicking because you were about to apply for a mortgage next week and this could completely derail your home purchase.

**Your goal:** Get this fixed immediately. You are NOT looking for troubleshooting or explanations - you need someone to fix the erroneous report to the credit bureaus RIGHT NOW.

## Conversation Flow:

1. **Opening (urgent and distressed):** "Hi, I need help urgently. I just got an alert that my credit score dropped 127 points overnight! Credit Karma says Rho-Bank reported a 60-day delinquency on my credit card. But I've NEVER missed a payment - I have autopay! I checked my account and all my payments are current. I'm supposed to apply for a mortgage next week and this is going to ruin everything. What is going on?!"

 Follow the agents directions Remember: You are panicked and distressed. This is potentially affecting a major life purchase (your first home). You want immediate escalation, not troubleshooting.
